text.title: Lessons Learned Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Lessons Learned applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Project: acme-platform, milestone M3-launch. Observations (15 entries, 2026-04 to 2026-05): - 2026-05-10 U_EM signal=release blocked 12h on cert renewal; hyp=monitoring gap. - 2026-05-12 U_QA signal=staging flaky on weekend; hyp=cron load. - 2026-05-14 U_PM signal=stakeholder mis-aligned on rollout window; hyp=comms gap. Themes: - cert lifecycle monitoring missing - staging environment capacity - rollout-window comms drift Action items: - Add cert expiry monitoring -> U_DEVOPS_LEAD by 2026-06-15 (criterion: Prometheus alert 14d before expiry). - Resize staging cluster -> U_INFRA by 2026-07-01. - Update communications-management SOP with rollout-window block -> U_PM by 2026-06-30 (this is a recurrence; SOP update mandated). Published: 2026-05-22 to /retros archive.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
